claim: Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image) combines multimodal understanding with advanced reasoning to reason over prompts before generating or editing images
actionable: Use Gemini 2.5 Flash Image for tasks requiring reasoning about intent before image generation (e.g., burnt lasagna shows actual damage, not just a photo)
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!

claim: Image editing is conversational; users can iteratively request changes (remove door, change hair, alter background) and model maintains character consistency across edits
actionable: Use Nano Banana for multi-step image editing workflows; conversational iteration is more efficient than sequential separate prompts
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!

claim: Advanced reasoning in image generation outperforms baseline models on complex prompts; Nano Banana's LLM reasoning catches vague intent better than diffusion-only
actionable: For creative tasks with ambiguous prompts, Nano Banana's reasoning-first approach yields more coherent outputs than traditional image models
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!

claim: Image restoration and colorization work well with Nano Banana; it can infer details from old/damaged photos better than static models
actionable: Use Nano Banana for photo restoration projects; reasoning over degradation allows intelligent reconstruction vs. generic filters
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!

claim: Nano Banana can generate images of some celebrities by name (e.g., Donald Trump); policy varies by region and availability
actionable: Be cautious about deepfake risks; verify terms of service and usage rights before generating celebrity likenesses
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!

claim: Merging multiple input images with prompts yields coherent compositions; Nano Banana can extract design themes and apply them to new images
actionable: Use Nano Banana to combine references; upload multiple inspiration images and let reasoning infer a cohesive design direction
source_title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image is Nano Banana!!
